message:
feat(abi): promote login accounting and netgroup from host delegation to native

Replace 9 host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- netgroup (4): setnetgrent/endnetgrent/getnetgrent/getnetgrent_r —
  pre-parses /etc/netgroup triples into thread-local vector
- login accounting (5): login (pututxline + updwtmp), logout (find +
  mark DEAD_PROCESS + writeback), logwtmp (construct + append),
  updwtmp/updwtmpx (raw syscall open/write/close)

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 8 → 3 (only getdate family remains)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
